evals.name: mars-rover-night-survival
evals.prompt: Perform a 2-node thermal analysis (Internal Electronics Box and Outer Shell) for a Mars rover during a winter night at the poles. Assume solar distance is 1.6 AU, surface temperature is -120C, and internal electronics dissipate 5W. Can it survive if the shell is covered in MLI (eps_eff=0.03)?
evals.expected_output: A thermal report showing the temperature of the internal electronics box and confirming survival status against standard electronics limits (-40C).
